purpose: Public-safe fixture for checking caller-provided redaction rules without encoding private policy names.

redactions.label: Synthetic policy identifier
redactions.sample: Escalate policy-alpha-42 through the shared review flow.
redactions.expected: Escalate [Policy identifier redacted] through the shared review flow.

boundary: The fixture is synthetic and caller-owned.
The shared package redacts using caller-provided rules but does not define project policy.
Real identifiers, thresholds, routing, approvals, and domain interpretation stay outside this package.
